PLAT_Notes: Developer portal requires login to access API keys and full functionality

development.SDK_prog_lang_list: JavaScript; TypeScript; Python; C#; PHP; Java; Kotlin; Go; Swift; Ruby; Objective-C; Rust; Dart; Clojure; GraphQL; Groovy; Scala

moderators.language_notes: Portal primarily in English with no language switcher found

evidence.API_evidence: PUBG Game Data Service API documented with JSON-API specification, GET endpoints for player stats, matches, telemetry data
evidence.SDK_evidence: Community SDKs listed for 17+ programming languages including JavaScript, Python, C#, PHP, Java, Go, Swift, Ruby and others
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI-specific features, models, or agent integrations found
evidence.language_evidence: All content in English, no language switcher or multi-language support detected

coding_notes: API provides game data with GET-only access. Extensive community SDK ecosystem. Monetization allowed through ads and donations per terms. Discord community for developers. Registration required for API keys.
